## Priority

<!-- How urgent is this? -->

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — Blocking core functionality
- [ ] 🟠 High — Important for user experience
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — Nice to have
- [ ] 🟢 Low — Future consideration
